final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity specification sheet for the "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an elegant, oriental aesthetic rooted in traditional Chinese "染" craft philosophy — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand color + typography specification layout with clear hierarchy for primary color, secondary colors, and font standards
Subject: must include the "染秋 (RAN QIU)" brand name prominently
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact atmosphere is yours
Color palette: must include autumn-inspired tones drawn from osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaves, oolong tea, cinnamon, sandalwood, amber — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined surface treatment evoking traditional Chinese dyeing craft — exact material choice is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 (RAN QIU)", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the brand philosophy of oriental philosophy and seasonal transition; must display primary color, secondary colors, and typography standards clearly
Avoid:
